steps.name: Given user goes to "personal-loan" page of "BFLHome" website
When user clicks on the inline video
Then user verifies BFLPersonalLoans Inline player functions Play,Mute,Speed,Quality,Fullscreen,SeekToEnd,Replay,Forward,Rewind
